name: Application Hardening
description: Making an application more resilient to attack.

name: Network Traffic Filtering
description: Restricting network traffic to and from an application.

name: Multi-factor Authentication
description: Requiring multiple authentication factors to verify user identity.

name: Password Hashing
description: One-way transformation of passwords for secure storage.

name: User Account Permissions
description: Restricting user account permissions to minimize attack surface.

name: Inbound Traffic Filtering
description: Filtering inbound network traffic to block malicious connections.

name: Application Layer Filtering
description: Filtering traffic at the application layer to block malicious payloads.

name: Decoy Environment
description: Creating a simulated environment to detect attackers.

name: Software Updates
description: Applying software patches and updates to fix vulnerabilities.

name: Email Filtering
description: Filtering email to detect and block phishing attempts.

name: Network Monitoring
description: Monitoring network traffic for indicators of compromise.

name: Backup
description: Creating copies of data to recover from destructive attacks.

name: Endpoint Monitoring
description: Monitoring endpoint activity for indicators of compromise.

name: Account Locking
description: Locking accounts after repeated failed authentication attempts.
